CustomField.formula: CASE( Country_Subsidiary__c , "Parent Company : SimilarWeb Inc","6 East 32nd Street, 8th Floor New York, NY 10016 United States", "Parent Company : SimilarWeb UK : SimilarWeb FR" ,"C/O Mazars France, 1 rue des Arquebusiers, 67000 Strasbourg, France", "Parent Company : SimilarWeb IL","33 Yizhak Rabin Road, Givatayim, 5348303, Israel", "Parent Company : SimilarWeb AU", "Suite 2204, 520 Oxford St. Bondi Junction, NSW, Australia", "Parent Company : SimilarWeb JP","Otemachi Building 6-1, Otemachi 1-chome, Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo 100-0004 Japan", "Parent Company : SimilarWeb UK","145 City Rd, Hoxton, London, EC1V 1AZ, United Kingdom", "Parent Company : SimilarWeb DE","c/o WeWork, Neuturmstrasse 5, Munich, BY 80331, Germany", "Parent Company : SimilarWeb SGD","135 Cecil Street #10-01, 069536, Singapore", null )
CustomField.label: Subsidiary Address
